description: Logan+Lynn 2-hero combo — Inf+Lanc class heroes. Lynn S1 has 40% chance (RNG). minxxx attacks with Logan+Lynn (600 troops), WIP defends (no hero, 1800 troops). 3:1 troop disadvantage for hero side. Placed as attackers so widget defense bonuses (S4) do not fire, making the fight competitive. Run 5 battles.
